arts.sum: Joe Champion has provided a score prediction for all 10 matches taking place in LaLiga on Friday, Saturday and Sunday.

arts.ttl: Sevilla lose midfielder for rest of 2024 as thigh injury diagnosis is confirmed
arts.sum: It’s not been an easy few weeks for Sevilla, who have won only one of their last five La Liga matches. They will hope to end 2024 on a high with their final two matches against Celta Vigo and Real Madrid, although as it turns out, they will be weakened for those upcoming fixtures at […] The post Sevilla lose midfielder for rest of 2024 as thigh injury diagnosis is confirmed appeared first on Football España.
